1.q: OoAREB1 directly binds to and activates the promoters of Ultraviolet-B receptor 8 (OoUVR8)... These results demonstrate that OoAREB1 directly binds these promoters and activates their transcription.

2.q: Y1H assays confirmed that OoAREB1 binds to promoters of OoUVR8, OoMacroD, OoAP, OoHVA22, OoPUB19, OoLEA3 genes. Co-expression of OoAREB1 with the target gene promoters enhanced LUC activity.
